response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates excellent general software engineering fundamentals and proven senior IC experience, they lack the core technical requirements for the role. With no Java work since 2014 and no Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience, they would require significant ramp-up on the foundational technologies essential for a mid-senior position focused on enterprise JVM tooling. The recent career focus on TypeScript/Node.js represents a substantial technical pivot from what this role demands.
strengths: Proven senior engineer across multiple complex systems with ability to own end-to-end features
Excellent communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship principles including TDD and clean architecture
concerns: No recent Java experience (last Java work ended in 2015 at National Instruments)
Complete absence of Spring ecosystem or enterprise Java framework experience
Recent 3+ years focused on TypeScript/Node.js, creating fundamental mismatch with JVM-based role

key_factors.factor: Proven senior IC capability and system design
